title: cyperus subfuscus
intro: Cyperus subfuscus, also known as the yellow papyrus sedge, is a plant species native to tropical and subtropical regions. This aquatic plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cyperus subfuscus include treating digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, as well as reducing fever and pain. Herbal preparations of Cyperus subfuscus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are typically taken orally to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
